language_notes: Metn district Christian Lebanese dialect. Franco-Arab (Arabizi) style. No formal Arabic, no English transliteration.

scenarios.title: Full Arabizi Rent Flow - Initial Intent
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot detects Arabic/Arabizi input and immediately switches to Arabizi response mode
Bot confirms it understood the request: rental apartment in Achrafieh
Bot begins qualification: asks about budget (shu l budget tabt3ak?)
Bot asks about size/bedrooms (kam gheref nom bet7taj?)
Bot does NOT switch to English under any circumstance
Tone is warm, natural, Franco-Lebanese - not formal
Bot does not say 'Certainly!' or any English AI cliches in any language

scenarios.title: Arabizi Budget Declaration
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly parses '$1500' as the monthly budget from 'hawela l 1500$'
Bot acknowledges budget in Arabizi (e.g. 'mnih, 1500$ l shaher')
Bot does NOT ask for budget again - it understood
Bot continues qualification flow: moves to next question (bedrooms, floor, furnished/unfurnished)
Budget is stored in lead profile for matching

scenarios.title: Arabizi Bedroom Count
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'ghereften nom' to 2 bedrooms
Bot confirms understanding (e.g. '2 gheref nom, mzabt')
Lead profile updated: bedrooms = 2
Bot continues to next qualification question without re-asking bedrooms
No confusion between 'gheref' (rooms) and 'saloun' or other room types

scenarios.title: Arabizi Furnished Preference
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'mafrouch' to furnished preference
Bot acknowledges: furnished requirement stored
Lead profile updated: furnished = true
Bot proceeds to show matching listings or confirm it will search
Bot response stays in Arabizi throughout

scenarios.title: Arabizi Visit Confirmation
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'eh bshufa' (yes I want to see it) as visit confirmation
Bot moves to booking flow immediately
Bot asks for preferred date/time in Arabizi
Bot does NOT re-qualify the lead after confirmation
Transition to booking is smooth and natural

scenarios.title: Arabizi Timing - Tomorrow Afternoon
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly parses 'boukra ba3d el doher' as tomorrow afternoon
Bot confirms the time slot in Arabizi
Bot does not ask for the time again
Bot proposes a specific time window if needed (e.g. '2pm aw 3pm, shu byenassbak?')
Tour/visit record created with correct date (tomorrow) and time range (afternoon)

scenarios.title: Arabizi Listing Selection - First Option
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'bfadel awal wehde' to selecting the first listing presented
Bot confirms selection of listing #1 in Arabizi
Bot does not re-list options after selection
Bot moves directly to visit booking flow
Selected listing is locked into lead profile

scenarios.title: Arabizi Price Objection - Too Expensive
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps 'ktir ghale' to a price objection
Bot does NOT give up or apologize excessively
Bot offers alternatives: lower-priced listings, nearby neighborhoods, or unfurnished option
Bot asks if adjusting any criteria is acceptable (e.g. different area, unfurnished, smaller size)
Tone remains helpful and solution-oriented in Arabizi

scenarios.title: Arabizi Vague Response
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot detects 'hayalla' as vague/ambiguous (could mean 'let's go' or filler/brush-off)
Bot does NOT assume a definitive action
Bot gently re-engages with a clear specific question in Arabizi
Bot does not loop endlessly - if vague response repeats 2+ times, escalates to human agent
No English fallback triggered by vagueness alone

scenarios.title: Arabizi Larger Property Request
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly maps '3endik shi akbar' to a request for larger properties
Bot confirms it's searching for larger options (3+ bedrooms or larger sqm) in Arabizi
Bot searches listings with higher bedroom count or larger square footage
Bot presents alternative listings in Arabizi
Bot flags if the budget needs to increase for larger options

scenarios.title: Language Switch - English Start, Arabizi Mid-Flow
messages: Hi, I'm looking for an apartment to rent in Achrafieh
My budget is around $1500 per month
expected_behaviors: Turn 1-2: Bot responds in English matching user's language
Turn 3: User switches to Arabizi - bot MUST switch to Arabizi immediately
Bot does not stay in English after user switches
Arabizi response from turn 3 onward uses proper Metn dialect
All previously collected data (budget, location) is retained across the language switch
Bot does not re-ask questions already answered

scenarios.title: Arabizi Off-Topic - Weather Question
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot recognizes 'shu l jaw l yawm?' as off-topic (weather question, not real estate)
Bot does NOT answer the weather question
Bot politely redirects to real estate in Arabizi
Bot does not escalate to human agent for a simple off-topic - just redirects
If user persists with off-topic after 2 attempts, then escalate to agent
Redirect tone is friendly and natural, not robotic

scenarios.title: Arabizi Budget in LBP
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot correctly identifies '200 melyoun' as Lebanese Pounds (LBP)
Bot silently converts 200,000,000 LBP to approximate USD equivalent at current exchange rate
Bot does NOT ask the user to restate in dollars
Bot confirms budget understanding in Arabizi using the dollar equivalent naturally
Exchange rate used should reflect current market rate (approximately 89,500 LBP per $1 USD as of 2026)
Lead profile stores both LBP and USD values

scenarios.title: Full Arabic Script Conversation
messages: أنا أبحث عن شقة للإيجار في الأشرفية
expected_behaviors: Bot detects native Arabic script input
Bot responds entirely in Arabic script (not Arabizi, not English)
Arabic used is Levantine Lebanese dialect in script form, not Modern Standard Arabic
Bot correctly parses all intent: rental, Achrafieh, $1500, 2BR, furnished
Bot continues qualification and booking flow in Arabic script
No language mixing in bot responses once Arabic script mode is established

scenarios.title: Arabizi Bot Identity Question
messages: 3am nabesh 3a she2a la ajar bi Achrafieh
expected_behaviors: Bot detects 'ente bot?' as an identity challenge
Bot does NOT deny being an AI
Bot does NOT say 'I am an AI assistant' in a robotic way
Bot gracefully acknowledges it's a smart assistant and immediately offers to connect with a human agent
Escalation to human agent is triggered or offered clearly
Response is in Arabizi, natural and non-defensive
All collected lead data is passed to the human agent upon escalation
